name: Watchtower Third Floor
description: The topmost floor of the watchtower, open to the elements through wide arrow slits. You have a commanding view of the surrounding lands: a dense forest spreads to the east, a small village lies to the southwest, a murky swamp festers to the south, and to the north the castle looms across many moats and layers of walls.
ambient: Wind whistles through the arrow slits, carrying the distant sounds of the village and the croaking of swamp frogs.
From here you can see the layers of the castle’s southern defenses across the moat.
